nodes.context: Ecuadorian crime syndicate specializing in drug trafficking, assassinations, and other crimes. Based in Esmeraldas.
Ecuadorian criminal organization from which Los Tiguerones split.
Ecuadorian gang that split from Los Choneros in 2020 and later allied with Los Tiguerones.
Ecuadorian gang that split from Los Choneros in 2020 and later allied with Los Tiguerones.
Ecuadorian gang formerly allied to Los Choneros, joined Nueva Generación alliance.
Mexican drug cartel that formed an alliance with Los Tiguerones and other gangs called Nueva Generación.
Listed as an ally of Los Tiguerones in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The group split from Los Choneros in 2020, along with Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers following the murder of Los Choneros leader Jorge Luis Zambrano.
edges.context: Los Tiguerones split from Los Choneros in 2020.

edges.evidence_quote: In 2021, Los Tiguerones, along with other gangs formerly allied to Los Choneros, including Los Chone Killers, Los Pipos, and Los Lobos, announced the creation of an alliance dubbed Nueva Generación after an alliance with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.context: Los Tiguerones and Los Lobos are allies in the Nueva Generación alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Chone Killers, Los Lobos, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Kompania Bello
edges.context: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers are allies.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Chone Killers, Los Lobos, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Kompania Bello
edges.context: Los Tiguerones and Jalisco New Generation Cartel are allies.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Chone Killers, Los Lobos, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Kompania Bello
edges.context: Los Tiguerones and Kompania Bello are allies.
Los Tiguerones and Los Choneros are rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: On 28 September 2021, a dispute between Los Lobos and Los Choneros in the Litoral Penitentiary, Guayaquil, led to a riot that killed 123 inmates... In that riot, members of the Los Tiguerones gang attacked inmates in pavilions 1 and 3 and beheaded five of them.
edges.context: Los Tiguerones attacked inmates alongside Los Lobos during a prison riot against Los Choneros.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Chone Killers and Tiguerones killed sixty-eight inmates in November 2021 at a prison riot in Litoral Penitentiary.
edges.context: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers jointly killed inmates in a prison riot.
